caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold and white lettering, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a microphone on a swivel arm, facing slightly to the left. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeating logo with five stars and the text "UNION MUSTLE." A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug is visible on a dark tabletop, featuring a red and white logo that says "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD." On the far left of the screen, a small circular logo is also visible. Across the frames, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and shifting his head and facial expressions slightly while maintaining his gaze toward the left.
